name: Old Fashioned Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Miracle Whip salad dressing, dry mustard, and pepper.
2. Add the cubed cooked potatoes, chopped hard-boiled eggs, chopped celery, and chopped onion to the bowl.
3. Mix lightly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Preparation time: 10-15 minutes
